name: blackveil-dns
description: DNS & email security scanner — 33 tools for SPF, DMARC, DKIM, DNSSEC, SSL, CAA, MTA-STS, and more. Powered by Blackveil Security.

tools.name: scan_domain
tools.description: Full DNS and email security audit. Score, grade, maturity, findings.

tools.name: check_spf
tools.description: Validate SPF syntax, policy, and trust surface.

tools.name: check_dmarc
tools.description: Validate DMARC policy, alignment, and reporting.

tools.name: check_dkim
tools.description: Probe DKIM selectors and validate key strength.

tools.name: check_dnssec
tools.description: Verify DNSSEC validation and DNSKEY/DS records.
